SEARCH

Package io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition.impl

package io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition.impl
Built-in partition-assignment strategies: round-robin, fixed-node-count, and least-loaded.

Each maps the work units produced by the partitioner onto the available nodes; the strategy is selected at runtime via the partitioner's chosen PartitionStrategy. The least-loaded strategy is load-aware, using the live per-node load reported in BATCH_NODES.

  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    io.github.jchejarla.springbatch.clustering.partition
    Master-side partitioning.
  • Classes
    Class
    Description
    FixedNodeCountPartitionAssignmentStrategy
    A partition strategy that assigns partitions to a fixed number of nodes.
    LeastLoadedPartitionAssignmentStrategy
    A load-aware strategy that assigns each partition to the node with the lowest current load.
    RoundRobinPartitionAssignmentStrategy
    A partition strategy that assigns partitions to nodes in a round-robin fashion.
